meta.title: Online Degree in Data Science with 100% Placement Assistance
meta.description: Build a future in analytics and AI with the BCA in Data Science program. Learn data visualization, Python, machine learning, and business analytics. Join Today!

mainEntity.name: What is BCA in Data Science?

acceptedAnswer.text: BCA in Data Science at Teksversity is a three-year undergraduate program designed to equip students with essential skills in data analysis, machine learning, statistical modeling, and business intelligence. Learn how to collect, process, and interpret data to make data-driven business decisions.

mainEntity.name: Why choose Teksversity for BCA in Data Science?

acceptedAnswer.text: Teksversity offers an industry-aligned BCA in Data Science program with hands-on projects, live labs, and expert mentorship. Gain practical experience in real-world data challenges and become career-ready in analytics, AI, and data-driven roles.

mainEntity.name: What are the core subjects in BCA in Data Science?

acceptedAnswer.text: The program covers Python, R, SQL, Data Analytics, Machine Learning, Big Data Technologies, Statistics, and Data Visualization. Students also gain hands-on experience with Tableau, Power BI, and cloud-based analytics platforms.

mainEntity.name: Who can apply for BCA in Data Science at Teksversity?

acceptedAnswer.text: Students who have completed 10+2 or equivalent from a recognized board can apply. While Mathematics or Computer Science background is preferred, motivated students from any stream can enroll and succeed in the program.

mainEntity.name: What skills will I gain from this program?

acceptedAnswer.text: Master data analytics, machine learning, predictive modeling, SQL, Python, R, and data visualization. Develop critical skills in problem-solving, analytical thinking, and making informed, data-driven business decisions.

mainEntity.name: What career opportunities can I explore after BCA in Data Science?

acceptedAnswer.text: Graduates can pursue careers as Data Analysts, Data Scientists, Business Intelligence Analysts, Machine Learning Engineers, AI Specialists, or Analytics Consultants in IT companies, startups, and enterprises leveraging data-driven strategies.

mainEntity.name: Can I pursue higher studies after BCA in Data Science?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes! Advance your career with MCA, M.Sc in Data Science, MBA in Analytics, or professional certifications like Google Data Analytics, AWS Machine Learning, or Microsoft Azure Data Scientist.

mainEntity.name: Does the program include practical training and internships?

acceptedAnswer.text: Absolutely! Teksversity emphasizes experiential learning through live projects, workshops, internships, and real-world case studies, giving students practical exposure to data science challenges.

mainEntity.name: How does Teksversity support placements for BCA in Data Science graduates?

acceptedAnswer.text: Teksversity provides 100% placement assistance with resume building, interview preparation, corporate tie-ups, and career mentoring. Connect with top recruiters and secure roles in leading IT and analytics companies.

mainEntity.name: Why is BCA in Data Science relevant in today’s industry?

acceptedAnswer.text: With the exponential growth of AI, machine learning, and big data, data-driven professionals are in high demand. This program prepares students with the knowledge and practical skills needed to excel in modern data-centric industries.

heading: The overview of
BCA in Data Science Program

content.value: at Teksversity prepares students to thrive in the data-driven world by teaching them to collect, process, and interpret vast amounts of information. This online degree in data science integrates computer science, statistics, and business intelligence empowering learners to make smarter, evidence-based decisions. The program blends theoretical learning with practical exposure through data modeling, visualization projects, and predictive analytics. Students gain expertise in using tools like Python, R, SQL, Tableau, Power BI, and Excel while understanding real-world data challenges. Whether your goal is to become a data analyst, business intelligence expert, or machine learning engineer, this program builds the foundation to excel in a data-centric career.

keyPoints: Develop strong analytical and quantitative reasoning
Learn end-to-end data collection, cleaning, and analysis
Build predictive models using machine learning algorithms
Create impactful visualizations and dashboards
Apply data insights to real-world business problems

heading: Why Choose BCA in Data Science in
Teksversity?
whyOnline.initialDescription: Choosing Teksversity for your Online BCA in Data Science Program means joining a curriculum designed with industry relevance at its core. The course combines academic rigor with practical training through real-time projects and case studies from diverse sectors.

description.firstDescription: Students work on live datasets, gaining exposure to AI-driven analytics, big data tools, and cloud-based platforms. With one-on-one mentorship, continuous career guidance, and 100% placement support, Teksversity ensures every learner is industry-ready.

description.secondDescription: At Teksversity, your BCA in Data Science is more than an academic degree it’s your pathway to becoming a data-driven problem solver capable of shaping smarter businesses and intelligent technologies.

keyPoints: Real-world data analytics and visualization projects
Advanced programming in Python, R, and SQL
Predictive modeling and AI-based analytics
Business case studies and live datasets
Data storytelling and visualization workshops
Practical training in Power BI and Tableau
Personalized mentorship from data experts
Continuous code review and performance feedback
24/7 access to datasets and analytical tools
Recorded sessions and revision materials
Internship coordination and placement tracking
Technical and academic support desk
100% placement assistance with career mentoring
Resume and LinkedIn optimization for analytics roles
Mock interviews and portfolio development
Internship tie-ups with analytics firms and IT companies
Certification support for Python, Power BI, and AI tools
Job-readiness training and project-based evaluation
Data hackathons and case competitions
Team-based analytics projects and workshops
Webinars with data scientists and industry experts
Peer group discussions and collaborative sessions
Alumni interactions and networking forums
Industry exposure through community projects

This guide outlines the straightforward steps, from creating your personal student account and submitting basic application details to uploading necessary documents and completing the secure fee payment, all leading to a quick verification and instant admission confirmation.

testimonialCards.name: Vishal
testimonialCards.review: I took a Data science with ai , IIT Certification course and tejaswi mam helped me to get into the Best course, now I got a job in Accent company with 6.5lpa. Thank you Teksversity Team and special thanks to madam .

testimonialCards.name: Vinitha P
testimonialCards.review: This Dual Certification course in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics is fantastic. The trainers are knowledgeable and the practical projects helped me apply concepts effectively. A must for anyone looking to excel in marketing and analytics!

testimonialCards.name: sadhana chittennoju
testimonialCards.review: I enrolled in the online Data Science course at Teksversity in March 2025. The Python, ML modules, real-world projects, and weekly assignments were very useful. Good placement support. It helped me build a strong portfolio. Great for career switchers

testimonialCards.name: Arun Pasunuri
testimonialCards.course: Data Science with AI and ML
testimonialCards.review: Joining TEKSVERSITY changed the way I learn. The dual certification programs boosted my confidence, and the hands-on training gave me real industry experience. Their zero down-payment EMI support truly helps students. TEKSVERSITY inspires you to grow.

testimonialCards.name: Ramadevi Koduri
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is the best place to learn dual certification in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics. I wanted to study two relevant courses for my MBA, and their counsellor guided me perfectly. I enrolled in both programs with confidence.

testimonialCards.name: Meghana
testimonialCards.review: My experience with Teksversity was amazing! The counselling session with Sireesha Reddy ma’am at Secunderabad helped me choose the right course. She patiently cleared all my doubts and gave great career clarity.

testimonialCards.name: Divya Peddiwar
testimonialCards.course: Data Science and Python full stack
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is where growth meets opportunity! Their dual courses and online degree programs helped me learn in multiple directions. The mentors boosted my skills and confidence, and the experience truly transformed the way I learn.

testimonialCards.name: Gayathri Prayaga
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity Education Institution exceeded my expectations! The faculty is knowledgeable and supportive. The curriculum is relevant and industry-focused. I appreciated the career services and opportunities provided. Highly recommended!

testimonialCards.name: Raghavenderan G
testimonialCards.review: Great institute with quality education at an affordable price. They offer trending, industry-ready courses and practical, supportive teaching. Their tie-ups with top universities add huge value. Highly recommended for strong learning and career growth.

testimonialCards.name: Laxmi Gayathri Chelimeda
testimonialCards.review: I took the Data Science course at Teksversity and gained strong practical, hands-on knowledge. The mentors were very supportive and explained concepts clearly. I’m also grateful for the career opportunity I received. A great learning experience
